name: Rose Preserve
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick the petals, removing any debris, leaves, stamens, or insects.
2. Coarsely chop 1 cup of petals in a processor and add 1 cup of sugar, half of the lemon juice, 2 tbsp rum, and another cup of sugar. Mix for a minute, scraping the sides of the processor bowl.
3. Repeat with the rest of the petals and remaining ingredients.
4. Pack into small jars (about 1 cup), tapping lightly to release air bubbles.
5. Cover and keep in a cool place.
NOTE:
This will last up to a year. It is used sparingly, so small jars are practical.
